parts.text:
Generate TWO 2D sprite icons for a tower defense game UI:

1. PAUSE icon:
- Prompt: "Fantasy pause button icon, medieval style, ornate scroll with pause symbol, game UI icon, transparent background, brown and gold color, stylized cartoon"
- Save to: Assets/Art/UI/Icons/icon_pause.png

2. SPEED icon:
- Prompt: "Fantasy speed button icon, medieval style, winged boot with lightning, game UI icon, transparent background, blue and gold color, stylized cartoon"
- Save to: Assets/Art/UI/Icons/icon_speed.png

Both are Mode A (Sprite only, no animation needed).

The game has a fantasy medieval theme. Make the icons crisp and readable at small UI sizes. Generate them one at a time.
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
